titleStmt.title: SII 26.696: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 696. (A.R. No. 650 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Śrī-Kulōttuṅgachōḷadēva I: Year 40, Ishabha (Vaikāśi) śu ·13 Monday, Hastam = 1110 A.D., May 2. The tithi was śu. 11, (Ēkādaśi).

summary.p: The continuation of the inscription at the end is not traceable. It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga, etc.

It records a sale of land in their village by the mahāsabhai of Pāvaikkuḍi alias Nittavinōdach-charuppēdimaṅgalam in Veṇṇāḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu. It is stated that the sabhai assembled in the Tirumēṟ-kōyilāḻvān temple at the village. The land was sold to the temple of Tirunallamuḍaiyār of Tirunallam a Brahmadēyam, in the same nāḍu and vaḷanāḍu. The land was intended for feeding the Śrīmāhēśvaras attending the Tiruvādirai festival held in the month of Mārgaḻi and the festival held in the month of Vaikāśi in the temple. The land was given as iṟaiyili.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīpukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ vaḷara malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi minavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉa mannavar Iṭutiṟai Iṭattikkaṉaittum tan cakkaranaṭātti virasiṅhāsanattu Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakesaripaṉmarāna tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkolo
ttuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 Āvatu Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu pāvaikkuṭiyāna nittavinotaccaruppetimaṅkalattu [olohi] mahāsabhaiyom Ivvāṭṭai Iṣabhanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu tiṅkaṭ kiḻamaiyum triyodaśiyum peṟṟa Attatti nānṟu nammur tirumeṟkoyilāḻvān koyilile kū
ṭṭak kuṟaikkūṭi Iruntu paṇippaṇiyāl paṇittu Innāṭṭu brahmadeśam tirunalattu tirunalam Uṭaiyār koyilil Ādicaṇḍeśvaradevar paṇṭārattu tevarkaṉmikaḷiṭai nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu Iraṇṭaraiyum vilai m kācu Araiyum Āka kācu munṟum śaṇḍeśvaradevarkanmikaḷ pakkal koṇṭu mārkaḻit tiruvāti
rait tirunāḷilum vaikācit tirunāḷilum śevikkum śrīmāheśvararai Amutu cevikka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu [śrī]maturān=takavatikku kiḻakku śrīcoḻakeraḷavākkālukku vaṭakku nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nilam mummāvaraiyum kiḻpāṟkellai vempaṭikaḷ can=tiracekaran nilattukku merku Ittenpāṟkellai rājentracoḻan va
n viḻumiyonen Ikkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ittevar tanma teva viḷākattuk kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai Immaṭapuṟattukku teṟkum Āka perunānkellaikkuḷḷu naṭupaṭṭa nilam mummāvaraiyum pottakappaṭi Eṟṟac curukkam Uḷḷaṭaṅka Iṟaiyili peruvācalvari Eccoṟu kūṟṟarici velikkācum maIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.696 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
